_meta.threshold_rationale: ±0.03 typical 20-fixture LLM variance; 0.05 catches true regressions without false-positive noise. See [[feedback-529-contamination-awareness]] for variance bands.

ocr_backend_history.2026-07-13+: Local PP-OCRv4 mobile (PaddleOCR 2.7.3, on-prem) — Huawei Cloud retained as fallback only. All prior suites' numbers are reference-only; new baselines below.

suites.name: phone_20
suites.note: **LOCAL OCR BASELINE (PP-OCRv4 mobile, 2026-07-13)** — composite 0.944. Pre-PP-OCRv4 (Huawei Cloud) was 0.9575; Δ=-0.013 within noise. 0/20 empty, r2_text fuzzy=1.000. **Re-run after type-refactor (commit 144ba61) measured 0.917, Δ=-0.027 within ±0.03 LLM variance band, 0 contamination** — baseline value unchanged. See memory eval-pp-ocrv4-phone20-baseline-2026-07-13 + type-intentfocus-unify-2026-07-13.

suites.name: phone_20_huawei_cloud_ref
suites.note: PRE-PP-OCRv4 reference only (Huawei Cloud). Superseded by phone_20 LOCAL baseline 0.944 on 2026-07-13. Do NOT use for regression checks.

suites.name: pii_20
suites.note: **LOCAL OCR BASELINE (PP-OCRv4 mobile, 2026-07-13)** — composite 0.929. Pre-PP-OCRv4 (Huawei Cloud) was 0.9521; Δ=-0.023 within noise but closer to threshold — pii suite is more sensitive to OCR text quality. 0/18 empty, r2_text fuzzy=1.000. **Server (450MB, CPU) at 0.940 = +0.011 over mobile** — server didn't unstick image_1391/2494 (both stuck at 0.79 in mobile AND server), so remaining -0.012 vs Huawei is type-routing, not OCR quality. **Re-run after type-refactor (commit 144ba61) measured 0.923, Δ=-0.006 within noise** — baseline value unchanged. See memory eval-pp-ocrv4-pii20-baseline-2026-07-13 + type-intentfocus-unify-2026-07-13.

suites.name: pii_20_server_cpu
suites.note: **SERVER-CPU reference (LOCAL_OCR_KIND=server, 450MB model, 27 s/img CPU) — 2026-07-13**. Composite 0.940. mobile=0.929 (+0.011 lift), Huawei Cloud=0.9521 (-0.012 in noise). Not the default baseline (server is 11x slower for iter); tracked as best-effort reference. Use LOCAL_OCR_KIND=server gradle :shared:eval --args=... to reproduce. (Reference only; no mobile re-run at commit 144ba61 since CPU is 11x slower per iter.)

suites.name: pii_20_huawei_cloud_ref
suites.note: PRE-PP-OCRv4 reference only (Huawei Cloud). Superseded by pii_20 LOCAL baseline 0.929 on 2026-07-13. Do NOT use for regression checks.

suites.name: direction_arrow_20
suites.note: **LOCAL OCR BASELINE (PP-OCRv4 mobile, 2026-07-13)** — composite 0.974. Pre-PP-OCRv4 (Huawei Cloud) was 0.9694; Δ=+0.005 (basically identical). 0/20 empty, r2_text fuzzy=1.000. **Re-run after type-refactor (commit 144ba61) measured 0.975, Δ=+0.001 within noise** — baseline value unchanged. See memory eval-pp-ocrv4-direction-arrow-baseline-2026-07-13 + type-intentfocus-unify-2026-07-13.

suites.name: direction_arrow_20_huawei_cloud_ref
suites.note: PRE-PP-OCRv4 reference only (Huawei Cloud). Superseded by direction_arrow_20 LOCAL baseline 0.974 on 2026-07-13. Do NOT use for regression checks.

suites.name: rctw_20_sanity
suites.note: RCTW @20 sanity — bounded by historical 0.92 ceiling; all-info expected_actions

suites.name: phone_60
suites.note: 55-fixture scaled suite (post-Phase-I + GT reclass v2). v5: 0.9200 (single run, LLM variance). v4 was 0.9307 (1 fewer reclass pass). v5 < v4 because LLM variance hits remaining fixtures; 4 newly moved fixtures (image_1882/6636/7296/7376) all score higher in service_institution_60 (composite 1.00/0.89/1.00/0.90). TRUE Phase I Δ ≈ -0.04 (avg of v4+v5 vs PRE 0.9617); within Phase I framework extension cost.

suites.name: pii20_60
suites.note: 18-fixture suite (post-Phase-I + GT reclass). v4: 0.9521. Reclassified image_2372/2540 (西医诊所) → service_institution_60, lifting composite +0.0165 from v3 0.9356. **TRUE Phase I Δ = -0.0061 vs pre-Phase-I 0.9582 (within noise)**

suites.name: direction_arrow_60
suites.note: 20-fixture suite (corpus-limited — clean GT; previous v1 baseline 0.9337 was on 54-fixture file with 34 duplicates). **TRUE Phase I Δ = +0.0206 vs pre-Phase-I 0.9488 (improvement; Pass 12 doesn't fire on direction_arrow, but llmHint may slightly help)**

suites.name: service_institution_60
suites.note: 67-fixture Phase I suite — 13th intent, OBSERVE family. v3: 0.9701 (was 63-fixture 0.9664 in v2). +4 reclassified fixtures from phone_60 (image_1882/6636/7296/7376) all scored ≥0.89 in service_institution. 11 categories (medical 22 / education 22 / government_admin 12 / financial 5 / government_law 3 / school_childcare 1 / clinic 1 / training 1 / childcare 1 / gov_service 1).
